Charge-Up.description: Must use Primary Action on consecutive turns to charge before using attack

Extended Charge.description: Must charge for two turns before using

Triple Charge.description: Must charge three turns before using

Cascade Failure.description: If interrupted during any charge turn, lose ability for rest of combat

Escalating Exposure.description: Each charge turn reduces your Durability by 2

Rooted While Charging.description: Cannot move between charge-up and release

Immobilized.description: Cannot move until end of turn after releasing attack

Anchored.description: If moved from position by any effect, lose charge

Melee.description: The attack you are making is a melee attack

Concentration.description: Lose charge if you take damage or gain conditions

Fragile Concentration.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves adjacent to you

Cascade Failure.description: If concentration broken, you cannot attempt any attack with Concentration for rest of combat

Proximity Sensitivity.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves within 5 spaces of you

Fragile.description: Avoidance becomes 0 while charging, all attacks are critical hits

Beacon.description: All enemies within 30 spaces know your exact location while charging

Vulnerable.description: Take double damage from all sources while charging

Power Lock.description: Disable specific defensive ability while charging, gain points equal to that ability's cost

Extended Lock.description: Disabled ability remains unusable until end of next turn

Multiple Lock.description: Disable second defensive ability, gain its cost in points

System Failure.description: Requires Concentration - If interrupted, all locked abilities unusable for rest of combat

Focused Charging.description: Must also spend Quick Action on charge and release turns

Total Focus.description: Must spend Primary Action, Quick Action, and Movement on charge turns

Ally Coordination.description: Adjacent ally must attack same target you're charging against or charge fails

Reaction Delay.description: Cannot use Reactions while charging, gain points equal to cost of reaction abilities you have purchased

Reserves.description: Can only be used 3 times per combat. Regain all uses after combat ends

Fragile Reserve.description: Each time you take damage, lose 1 use

Critical Failure.description: If you roll a natural 1 on any d20, lose 1 use

Extended Recovery.description: Regain uses after full rest instead of after combat, once per day

Preparation.description: You need to spend 8 hours of time preparing, to recover uses

Weekly Preparation.description: Can only regain uses once per week

Slow Recovery.description: Regain only 1 use per rest period instead of all uses

Volatile Uses.description: External factors can cause unexpected use loss

Proximity Loss.description: Lose 1 use when enemy ends turn adjacent to you

Damage Cascade.description: Taking 10+ damage in single attack causes loss of 1 use

Condition Trigger.description: Gaining any Advanced Condition causes loss of all remaining uses

Shared Pool.description: Multiple special attacks share same use pool, total uses divided among them, +1 use for each special attack added

Pool Drain.description: If any attack in pool misses, remove an extra use

Cascade Lock.description: If any attack in pool misses, no attacks in pool can be used for 1 turn

Resource Drain.description: When out of uses, cannot take Quick Actions

Stat Drain.description: When out of uses, subtract Tier from Accuracy and Damage

Life Drain.description: When out of uses, take 10 damage at start of each turn, until you hit 0 hp

Movement Lock.description: When out of uses, Movement reduced by your Tier

Usage Prerequisites.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat

Unhealthy.description: Must be below half HP to use

Melee.description: Must be adjacent to enemy to use

Target History.description: Can only target enemies you have not attacked this combat

Cooldown.description: Cannot use again for 1 turn after use

Cooldown 2.description: Cannot use again for 2 turns after use

Cooldown 3.description: Cannot use again for 3 turns after use

Permanent Injury.description: Each use increases cooldown by 1 turn permanently

Fates.description: Roll a d4-1 when the attack is made, the cooldown is extended by the result

Failure Extension.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown increases by 2 turns

Cascade Extension.description: If attack fails, all your special attacks gain +1 turn cooldown

Attrition.description: Take 10 damage for each turn spent on cooldown

Shared Cooldown.description: 3 special attacks share same cooldown timer

Pool Interference.description: When one attack is on cooldown, all others have +1 turn added

System Lock.description: If any shared attack fails, entire pool gains +2 turn cooldown

Cascade Shutdown.description: One attack failing puts all shared attacks on 5-turn cooldown

Conditional Reset.description: Must wait cooldown period then expend a quick action to regain special attack

Combat Victory.description: Instead of quick action, you need to expend an action

Environmental.description: Cooldown only resets in specific location/weather/time

Ally Dependent.description: Ally must use specific action to reset your cooldown

Trigger Extension.description: Taking damage or gaining conditions adds 1 turn to current cooldown

Damage Cascade.description: Taking damage or gaining conditions adds an additional turn to current cooldown

Condition Spiral.description: Conditions last until the end of your cooldown period

Death Proximity.description: Cooldown increases by 1 turn for every 25 HP below maximum

Reliability.description: Roll d20 before use; if under 5, attack fails and action is wasted

Double Check.description: Must make reliability check twice, both must succeed

Stress Breakdown.description: Reliability DC increases by 1 each turn of combat

Rapid Degradation.description: Reliability DC increases by an additional 1 each turn of combat

Permanent Decay.description: Each failed check permanently increases future DCs by 5

Equipment Dependent.description: You have a specific, noticeable and disarmable item, in order to do any attack

Fragile Gear.description: If you fail the Unreliable roll, the item breaks and won't be fixed until you spend 8 hours, or meet another specified condition (discuss with GM)

Maintenance.description: Equipment breaks if attack fails, requires action to repair

Health Dependent.description: DC increases by 1 for every 10 HP missing

Cascading Failure.description: Each failure increases next reliability DC by 5

Accelerated Decay.description: Each failure increases DC by 10 instead of 5

Spread Effect.description: Failed checks increase DC for all your special attacks

Critical Cascade.description: Three failures in combat make ability unusable for rest of session

Failure Backlash.description: When unreliable roll fails, take 15 damage when attack fails

Self Damage.description: When unreliable roll fails, take an additional 15 damage when attack fails

Condition Infliction.description: When unreliable roll fails, gain Stun condition

Exhaustion.description: When unreliable roll fails, you must spend an effort or fall unconscious

Sequential.description: You must have hit an enemy on your last turn

Combat History.description: You must have hit an enemy on your last turn

Damage History.description: You must have done damage on your last turn

Kill History.description: You must have defeated an enemy on your last turn

Perfect History.description: You must have critically hit on your last turn

Action Chain.description: Must use Aim, Empower, or Refine Action this turn before use

Double Chain.description: Must use two different Primary Actions this turn before use

Perfect Chain.description: All prerequisite actions this turn must succeed or this fails

Specific Chain.description: Must use one specific Primary Action chosen at character creation

Target History.description: Can only target enemies you have not damaged this combat

Fresh Targets Only.description: Can only target enemies no ally has damaged this combat

Finishing Move.description: Can only target enemies with 25 HP or below

Hunter Restriction.description: Can only target one specific enemy type chosen at character creation

Ally Setup.description: Adjacent ally must have attacked this turn for you to use this

Coordination.description: Ally must target same enemy you're about to attack this turn

Sacrifice.description: Ally must have taken 10+ damage this turn for you to use this

Perfect Teamwork.description: Ally's attack must have hit for your attack to work

Combat Gate.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat

Late Entry.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat

Escalation.description: Cannot use until someone has taken 20+ damage this combat

Desperation.description: Cannot use until ally is unconscious

Set Up.description: Must have hit with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken)

Solid Set Up.description: Must have damaged with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken)

Perfect Set Up.description: Must have critically hit with specific special attack

Applied Condition.description: Must have applied condition with specific special attack

Health State.description: Can only use when below max HP

Critical State.description: Can only use when at 75 HP or below

Death's Door.description: Can only use when at 50 HP or below

Last Breath.description: Can only use when at 25 HP or below

Zero Hour.description: Can only use when at 0 HP or below

Fresh Wound.description: Must have taken 10+ damage this turn to use

Significant Trauma.description: Must have taken 25+ damage this turn to use

Recent Pain.description: Must have taken damage within last 2 turns to use

Continuous Suffering.description: Must take 5+ damage every turn or lose access, unusable for 2 turns

Blood Price.description: Each use costs 15 HP, paid after attack resolves

Escalating Price.description: Each successive use costs additional 15 HP (15, 30, 45, etc.)

Vital Sacrifice.description: Each use permanently reduces maximum HP by 10

Life Force.description: Each use costs half your current HP (minimum 10)

Last Resort.description: Can only use when ally is at 25 HP or below

Desperation.description: Can only use when 2+ allies are at 25 HP or below

Avenge.description: Can when an ally is unconscious

Final Stand.description: Can only use when 2+ allies are unconscious

Condition Lock.description: Can only use while affected by any Condition, can't be inflicted by an ally or yourself

Multiple Afflictions.description: Must be affected by 2+ different conditions

Deterioration.description: Each use extends all your conditions by 1 turn

Timid.description: Can only use when at max HP, instead of when below max HP

Pristine.description: Can only use when at max HP and no conditions

Perfect Moment.description: Can only use when at max HP and all enemies have missed you this turn
